prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild tavern corner, Ren Ashbell (androgynous frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and bright scarf) kneels under a wooden table, gently reaching out with a calm, protective hand toward a flickering, disoriented mana hound emitting soft blue magical sparks, cinematic low-angle shot, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot under the tavern table, Ren Emberlane (masculine scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps) slides in beside Ren Ashbell, placing a steadying hand on Ashbell's shoulder while extending their own hand to synchronize with Ashbell's, together they successfully calm the mana hound's erratic glowing energy, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
